description: Refactor the hardcoded Docker Compose configuration in `~/projects/inventory-system/docker-compose.yml` for an Inventory System to support multi-environment deployments. Replace hardcoded values for the Postgres Image Tag, Postgres Password, Node.js Image Tag, Host Port mapping, and App Mode environment variable with environment variables using the `${VARIABLE:-default}` format, ensuring the existing development values are preserved as defaults. Create a production environment file named `~/projects/inventory-system/.env.prod` defining Postgres Version 15, Postgres Password 'secure_prod_pass_2024', Node.js Version '20-slim', Host Port 80, and App Mode 'production'. Deploy the stack using these production settings. The application source code in `app/` is read-only and listens on port 3000 internally.
